title: Xtra Briny Spanish Epoisses Tapas Platter
description: A romantic Catalan dish featuring epoisses, saute, and a briny glassy jelly, served as a tapas platter in a kadhai
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a kadhai over medium heat
Add the minced garlic and saute for 1 minute
Add the epoisses cheese and stir until melted and smooth
Add the lemon juice, pimenton, and sea salt, and stir to combine
In a small bowl, sprinkle the gelatin over the water and let it bloom for 5 minutes
Add the gelatin mixture to the cheese mixture and stir to combine
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 5 minutes
Remove the kadhai from the heat and let it cool to room temperature
Refrigerate the mixture until set, about 3 hours
Just before serving, garnish with chopped fresh parsley
